Defines application IDs for various system apps in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a set of constants representing application installation identifiers. Each identifier is associated with a specific application, such as `APP_ID_TICTOC`, `APP_ID_MUSIC`, and `APP_ID_NOTIFICATIONS`, and is defined as a negative integer cast to the type `AppInstallId`. These identifiers are likely used to manage or reference different applications within a larger system, possibly for installation or configuration purposes.
